channel.title: life on Chris Colvin </> Developer & Photographer
channel.description: Recent content in life on Chris Colvin </> Developer & Photographer

item.title: John Ball Zoo - May 17, 2026
item.description: This morning Jess and I went to John Ball Zoo here in Grand Rapids, MI.

item.title: South Haven - May 9th, 2026
item.description: Today, on my way back from the Chicago area, I stopped in South Haven and took some pictures while I was there.

item.title: I Am Not Profound
item.description: I Am Not Profound By every definition of the word, I am not profound.

item.title: Go to Bed. Get Up. Repeat.
item.description: I’ve never been one of those people that can fall asleep anywhere at any time, and I’ve always been a bit jealous of those who can.

item.title: To Start, Forget Everything You Know
item.description: Today, I needed to do something at work that I hadn’t done in years.
